title: Add Copy/Past login and password
author: mshalmanov
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
Please add possibility Copy/Past login and password buttons to ssh and rdp connection. How is it done in RoaylTS.

## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggesting a change/improvement, tell us how it should work -->
When user connected to Linux or Windows OS machine. He is can copy and past login or password from the account of the computer to which it is con...

comments.author: simonai1254
comments.snippet:
You would like mRemoteNG to extract the information from the connection file? 

This is generally considered leaking data, especially since mRemoteNG does not yet have proper encryption on the connection file. See #2420, and #2189. 

Anyway, if you really would like this feature you can help yourself with the guide of this comment here: https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG/issues/2193#issuecomment-1146343983

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: this could be added with few restrictions, as per new connection profile (not release yet) we don't store passwords in mR anymore due mentioned potential data leak, and passwords are encoded and encrypted in connection profile what could be on the different location (db, shared drive, cloud, cyberark etc.) so you will be allow (if setting is not enabled - copy protection) clone connection data but in regards copy password to expose it I have doubts

comments.author: CMAPTu
comments.snippet:
As a simple workaround, you can create External tool entry "password to clipboard":

`cmd /Q /C "MODE 30,5 && echo %PASSWORD%| clip && TIMEOUT /T 10 /NOBREAK && echo off | clip"`

It copies password to clipboard for 5 sec and then erase it. The only problem is special symbols in passwords like redirect (<,>), slashes and etc.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `5a9ad758` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Add Copy/Past login and password

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork builds entirely on yo...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Legitimate UX enhancement to copy credentials to clipboard from connection tree context menu, with a workaround already documented via External Tool entry.
Approach: Add 'Copy Username' and 'Copy Password' context menu items on connection tree nodes that write decrypted credentials to clipboard with optional auto-clear after timeout, similar to the documented External Tool workaround.
